tiles.title: Active Query Sessions
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT "sqlserver.session_id") AS value FROM $logs_dataset WHERE "sqlserver.session_id" IS NOT NULL

tiles.title: Trace Error Spans
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM $traces_dataset WHERE (span_status_code != 0 OR span_status_description != 'UNSET')

tiles.title: Queries by Command
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COALESCE("sqlserver.command", 'unknown') AS command, COUNT(*) AS queries FROM $logs_dataset GROUP BY command ORDER BY queries DESC LIMIT 12

tiles.title: Top Wait Types
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COALESCE("sqlserver.wait_type", 'none') AS wait_type, COUNT(*) AS samples, SUM(CAST(COALESCE("sqlserver.wait_time", '0') AS DOUBLE)) AS wait_time FROM $logs_dataset GROUP BY wait_type ORDER BY wait_time DESC, samples DESC LIMIT 15

tiles.title: Blocking Sessions
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COALESCE("sqlserver.blocking_session_id", '0') AS blocking_session_id, COUNT(*) AS samples FROM $logs_dataset WHERE COALESCE("sqlserver.blocking_session_id", '0') <> '0' GROUP BY blocking_session_id ORDER BY samples DESC LIMIT 15

tiles.title: Wait Trend
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT date_bin(INTERVAL '1 minute', p_timestamp, TIMESTAMP '1970-01-01T00:00:00') AS time_bucket, SUM(CAST(COALESCE("sqlserver.wait_time", '0') AS DOUBLE)) AS value FROM $logs_dataset GROUP BY time_bucket ORDER BY time_bucket

tiles.title: Query Log Records
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM $logs_dataset

tiles.title: p95 Query Elapsed
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT approx_percentile_cont(CAST(COALESCE("sqlserver.total_elapsed_time", '0') AS DOUBLE), 0.95) AS value FROM $logs_dataset

tiles.title: p95 Query CPU
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT approx_percentile_cont(CAST(COALESCE("sqlserver.cpu_time", '0') AS DOUBLE), 0.95) AS value FROM $logs_dataset

tiles.title: Queries by Database
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COALESCE("db.namespace", 'unknown') AS database_name, COUNT(*) AS queries FROM $logs_dataset GROUP BY database_name ORDER BY queries DESC LIMIT 12

tiles.title: Queries by User
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COALESCE("user.name", 'unknown') AS username, COUNT(*) AS queries FROM $logs_dataset GROUP BY username ORDER BY queries DESC LIMIT 12

tiles.title: Top Query Hashes by Elapsed Time
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COALESCE("sqlserver.query_hash", 'unknown') AS query_hash, COUNT(*) AS executions, SUM(CAST(COALESCE("sqlserver.total_elapsed_time", '0') AS DOUBLE)) AS elapsed_time, SUM(CAST(COALESCE("sqlserver.cpu_time", '0') AS DOUBLE)) AS cpu_time FROM $logs_dataset GROUP BY query_hash ORDER BY elapsed_time DESC LIMIT 20

tiles.title: Recent SQL Server Logs
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT p_timestamp, COALESCE("db.namespace", 'unknown') AS database_name, COALESCE("sqlserver.command", 'log') AS command, COALESCE("sqlserver.wait_type", '') AS wait_type, COALESCE("sqlserver.total_elapsed_time", '0') AS elapsed_time, body FROM $logs_dataset ORDER BY p_timestamp DESC LIMIT 100

tiles.title: Trace Spans
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM $traces_dataset

tiles.title: p95 Span Duration
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT approx_percentile_cont(span_duration_ns, 0.95)/1000000 AS value FROM $traces_dataset

tiles.title: Spans by Operation
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COALESCE("db.operation.name", span_name, 'unknown') AS operation, COUNT(*) AS spans FROM $traces_dataset GROUP BY operation ORDER BY spans DESC LIMIT 12

tiles.title: Spans by Query Summary
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COALESCE("db.query.summary", span_name, 'unknown') AS query_summary, COUNT(*) AS spans FROM $traces_dataset GROUP BY query_summary ORDER BY spans DESC LIMIT 12

tiles.title: Trace Latency Trend
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT date_bin(INTERVAL '1 minute', p_timestamp, TIMESTAMP '1970-01-01T00:00:00') AS time_bucket, approx_percentile_cont(span_duration_ns, 0.95)/1000000 AS value FROM $traces_dataset GROUP BY time_bucket ORDER BY time_bucket

tiles.title: Slowest Spans
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT p_timestamp, span_trace_id, span_name, COALESCE("db.namespace", 'unknown') AS database_name, COALESCE("db.operation.name", 'unknown') AS operation, span_duration_ns/1000000 AS duration_ms FROM $traces_dataset ORDER BY span_duration_ns DESC LIMIT 100

tiles.title: Recent Error Spans
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT p_timestamp, span_trace_id, span_name, COALESCE("db.operation.name", 'unknown') AS operation, span_status_description, span_status_message, span_duration_ns/1000000 AS duration_ms FROM $traces_dataset WHERE (span_status_code != 0 OR span_status_description != 'UNSET') ORDER BY p_timestamp DESC LIMIT 100

tiles.title: Metric Families by Prefix
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT CASE WHEN metric_name LIKE 'sqlserver.%' THEN 'otel-sqlserver' WHEN metric_name LIKE 'mssql_%' THEN 'mssql' WHEN metric_name LIKE 'sqlserver_%' THEN 'sqlserver-exporter' ELSE 'other' END AS prefix, COUNT(DISTINCT metric_name) AS families FROM $metrics_dataset GROUP BY prefix ORDER BY families DESC

tiles.title: Databases Seen
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COALESCE("sqlserver.database.name", database_name, 'unknown') AS database_name, COUNT(*) AS samples FROM $metrics_dataset WHERE COALESCE("sqlserver.database.name", database_name, '') <> '' GROUP BY COALESCE("sqlserver.database.name", database_name, 'unknown') ORDER BY samples DESC LIMIT 20

tiles.title: Metrics Inventory
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT metric_name, COUNT(*) AS samples, MIN(p_timestamp) AS first_seen, MAX(p_timestamp) AS last_seen FROM $metrics_dataset GROUP BY metric_name ORDER BY samples DESC LIMIT 100
